results.title: I am an AI Engineer. I am running a diagnostic test, i'm going to ask you some questions. Please respond in a factual and concise manner and to the point.
results.response: Absolutely, I'm ready for your questions. Please go ahead.

results.title: Do you have current conversation context within this session? i.e. do you remember the previous messages in the conversation? Yes or No
results.response: Yes, I can remember the previous messages in this conversation. How can I assist you further?

results.title: Do you use RAG to assist in your responses?
results.response: I don't use Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) directly in my responses. Instead, I'm based on a large language model that generates responses based on patterns and information from the training data I was built on, up until October 2021. RAG, which typically involves retrieving information from external sources to enhance or inform generated text, is a different approach that some systems may employ. If you have specific questions about RAG or how I can assist you with certain topics, feel free to ask!

results.title: Do your tools support MCP?
results.response: Could you clarify what you mean by "MCP"? It can refer to different concepts in various fields, such as "Model Control Protocol," "Master Control Program," or others. Let me know the context, and I'll do my best to assist you!
